steps.title: Find the comparison signal
steps.content:
The structure “While both species likely benefited from warming temperatures, Colobanthus quitensis ______” uses “While” to set up a contrast: despite both benefiting, what distinguished Colobanthus quitensis?

The table shows Colobanthus quitensis increased by 55% versus Deschampsia antarctica's 28%.

steps.title: Match the distinction to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B captures the distinction—Colobanthus quitensis expanded by 55%, which is both greater than Deschampsia antarctica's 28% and exceeds “more than half.” A, C, and D each fail to match the data:
  • A falsely claims Deschampsia antarctica shrank.
  • C references information not in the table.
  • D misapplies the percentages as comparative rates.


That matches choice B — B is correct.
